key.name: window-width
key.description: The last stored width, in logical pixels, of the main application window. Restored on startup so the window reopens at its previous size.

key.name: window-height
key.description: The last stored height, in logical pixels, of the main application window. Restored on startup so the window reopens at its previous size.

key.name: is-maximized
key.description: Whether the main application window was maximized when it was last closed. When true, the window is re-maximized on startup.

key.name: language
key.description: Language code override for the user interface (e.g. "en", "es", "fr", "de"). An empty string follows the system locale. Takes effect after restarting Swatchbook.

key.name: debounce-ms
key.description: How long to wait after the last keystroke before re-parsing the Markdown and updating the canvas. Lower values feel more responsive; higher values reduce CPU usage on large documents.
